title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: Admin API utilities shokenuse (util_fetch_usage() util_fetch_cost()) provide programmatic access organization’s historical token usage cost data Anthropic’s reporting endpoints. Important: functions require Admin API key (sk-ant-admin...) provisioned Anthropic Console. available individual (personal) accounts — organizations Admin API enabled.

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: Anthropic Console, navigate Settings → Admin Keys create key. Store environment variable: add ~/.Renviron:

what: 2. Verify the key is available in R
title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: util_fetch_usage() wraps GET /v1/organizations/usage_report/messages endpoint. handles pagination automatically returns tidy tibble.

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: Expected output (columns depend group_by):
code: usage <- util_fetch_usage(   starting_at  = Sys.time() - 30 * 24 * 3600,   ending_at    = Sys.time(),   bucket_width = "1d" ) usage # A tibble: 30 × 6    timestamp_bucket     input_tokens output_tokens cache_creation_input_tokens    <chr>                       <int>         <int>                       <int>  1 2026-04-01T00:00:00Z       482910        128470                      182043  2 2026-04-02T00:00:00Z       291830         73291                       91032  # ℹ 28 more rows  # ℹ 2 more variables: cache_read_input_tokens <int>, n_requests <int>

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
code: by_model <- util_fetch_usage(   starting_at  = Sys.time() - 7 * 24 * 3600,   ending_at    = Sys.time(),   bucket_width = "1d",   group_by     = "model" ) by_model

what: Hourly usage for a single day
title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
Using the Anthropic Admin API
code: opus_only <- util_fetch_usage(   starting_at  = Sys.time() - 14 * 24 * 3600,   ending_at    = Sys.time(),   bucket_width = "1d",   models       = c("claude-opus-4-7", "claude-opus-4") )

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: util_fetch_cost() wraps GET /v1/organizations/cost_report. Costs daily (bucket_width = "1d" fixed). Group workspace chargeback reporting:
code: costs <- util_fetch_cost(   starting_at = Sys.time() - 30 * 24 * 3600,   ending_at   = Sys.time() ) costs by_workspace <- util_fetch_cost(   starting_at = "2026-05-01T00:00:00Z",   ending_at   = "2026-05-31T23:59:59Z",   group_by    = c("workspace_id", "description") )

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: fetched, tibbles work directly ggplot2.

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
code: library(ggplot2)  by_model |>   dplyr::mutate(date = as.Date(timestamp_bucket)) |>   ggplot(aes(x = date, y = input_tokens, fill = model)) +   geom_col() +   scale_y_continuous(     labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())   ) +   labs(x = NULL, y = "Input tokens", fill = "Model") +   theme_minimal()

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
code: costs |>   dplyr::mutate(date = as.Date(timestamp_bucket)) |>   dplyr::arrange(date) |>   dplyr::mutate(cumulative_cost = cumsum(cost_usd)) |>   ggplot(aes(x = date, y = cumulative_cost)) +   geom_line() +   geom_area(alpha = 0.2) +   scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar) +   labs(x = NULL, y = "Cumulative cost (USD)") +   theme_minimal()

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: functions handle pagination internally (via max_pages, default 10). large date ranges may need increase :
code: # Fetch up to 50 pages big_pull <- util_fetch_usage(   starting_at  = "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",   ending_at    = Sys.time(),   bucket_width = "1d",   max_pages    = 50L )

what: Synthetic example (runs without an API key)
title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: structure mirrors util_fetch_usage() returns, can prototype visualizations without credentials. Add estimated costs using package pricing table:
code: library(shokenuse)  # Simulate 14 days of daily usage across two models set.seed(42) dates  <- seq(as.Date("2026-05-01"), by = "day", length.out = 14) models <- c("claude-opus-4", "claude-sonnet-4")  synthetic_usage <- tidyr::expand_grid(   timestamp_bucket = paste0(dates, "T00:00:00Z"),   model            = models ) |>   dplyr::mutate(     input_tokens                = as.integer(runif(dplyr::n(), 5e4, 5e5)),     output_tokens               = as.integer(runif(dplyr::n(), 1e4, 1e5)),     cache_creation_input_tokens = as.integer(runif(dplyr::n(), 0,   2e5)),     cache_read_input_tokens     = as.integer(runif(dplyr::n(), 1e5, 2e6)),     n_requests                  = as.integer(runif(dplyr::n(), 10,  200))   )  synthetic_usage #> # A tibble: 28 × 7 #>    timestamp_bucket     model  input_tokens output_tokens cache_creation_input…¹ #>    <chr>                <chr>         <int>         <int>                  <int> #>  1 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z claud…       461662         50227                 135455 #>  2 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z claud…       471683         85240                  34252 #>  3 2026-05-02T00:00:00Z claud…       178762         76383                  52217 #>  4 2026-05-02T00:00:00Z claud…       423701         82994                 102882 #>  5 2026-05-03T00:00:00Z claud…       338785         44929                 135121 #>  6 2026-05-03T00:00:00Z claud…       283593         71665                 196563 #>  7 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z claud…       381464         10355                 151908 #>  8 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z claud…       110599         84962                 113297 #>  9 2026-05-05T00:00:00Z claud…       345646         10660                 169937 #> 10 2026-05-05T00:00:00Z claud…       367279         28689                  37894 #> # ℹ 18 more rows #> # ℹ abbreviated name: ¹​cache_creation_input_tokens #> # ℹ 2 more variables: cache_read_input_tokens <int>, n_requests <int> synthetic_costed <- synthetic_usage |>   dplyr::rename(     cache_creation_tokens = cache_creation_input_tokens,     cache_read_tokens     = cache_read_input_tokens   ) |>   dplyr::mutate(     timestamp   = as.POSIXct(timestamp_bucket, tz = "UTC"),     machine     = "api",     source      = "anthropic_api",     project     = NA_character_,     session_id  = NA_character_   ) |>   util_add_cost()  util_summarise_usage(synthetic_costed, by = "model") #> # A tibble: 2 × 8 #>   model       input_tokens cache_creation_tokens cache_read_tokens output_tokens #>   <chr>              <int>                 <int>             <int>         <int> #> 1 claude-opu…      4709386               1221473          15922926        677191 #> 2 claude-son…      4400817               1202590          14512778        994141 #> # ℹ 3 more variables: cost_usd <dbl>, n_requests <int>, total_tokens <int>

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: API data can merged dashboard two ways:

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
text: Open Data tab, enter sk-ant-admin... key, give source Machine label (e.g. "org-name"), click Fetch Usage, click Add Dashboard. Repeat different key load data another organization — fetch appends existing dashboard data.

title: Using the Anthropic Admin API
code: api_usage <- util_fetch_usage(   starting_at = Sys.time() - 30 * 24 * 3600,   group_by    = "model" )  # Convert to the usage schema expected by util_combine_usage() api_rows <- api_usage |>   dplyr::mutate(     timestamp             = as.POSIXct(timestamp_bucket, tz = "UTC"),     machine               = "api",     source                = "anthropic_api",     project               = NA_character_,     session_id            = NA_character_,     cache_creation_tokens = cache_creation_input_tokens,     cache_read_tokens     = cache_read_input_tokens,     date                  = as.Date(timestamp)   ) |>   dplyr::select(timestamp, date, machine, source, project, session_id,                 model, input_tokens, cache_creation_tokens,                 cache_read_tokens, output_tokens) |>   util_add_cost()  # Optionally combine with other data before inspecting all_usage <- util_combine_usage(api_rows, util_read_usage_csv("export.csv")) util_summarise_usage(all_usage, by = "model")  launch_app()

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: shokenuse reads LLM token-usage logs Claude Code AI assistants, estimates costs using Anthropic’s published pricing, surfaces results Shiny dashboard. designed developers use Claude Code heavily want understand tokens going — across multiple machines, projects, models, sessions. core data pipeline :
code: util_read_claude_code()  ─┐ util_read_usage_csv()    ─┤─► util_combine_usage() ─► util_add_cost() ─► util_summarise_*()                           ┘                                                      │                                                                            launch_app()

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: Install package directory:
code: # pak::pak("mjfrigaard/shokenuse")   # once on GitHub devtools::load_all()                  # during local development

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: Claude Code writes one JSONL file per session ~/.claude/projects/. util_read_claude_code() scans directory recursively returns one row per API response. row represents single assistant response. four token columns map directly Anthropic’s API usage object: session_id column UUID JSONL file; project column derived folder name Claude Code uses organise sessions.
code: library(shokenuse)  usage <- util_read_claude_code() usage # A tibble: 3,847 × 10    timestamp           machine source       project         session_id  model    <dttm>              <chr>   <chr>        <chr>           <chr>       <chr>  1 2026-04-01 08:12:03 local   claude_code  projects/apps/R abc123…     claude-opus-4  2 2026-04-01 08:12:41 local   claude_code  projects/apps/R abc123…     claude-opus-4  3 2026-04-01 09:45:10 local   claude_code  projects/pkgs/… def456…     claude-sonnet-4  # ℹ 3,844 more rows  # ℹ 4 more variables: input_tokens <int>, cache_creation_tokens <int>,  #   cache_read_tokens <int>, output_tokens <int>

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: work across two machines, sync mount .claude/projects folder machine pass path along label: util_combine_usage() row-binds number data frames sorts result timestamp. machine column lets filter facet machine later. convenient way keep one place define directories combine programmatically:
code: mac_usage    <- util_read_claude_code("~/.claude/projects",           machine = "macOS") ubuntu_usage <- util_read_claude_code("/mnt/ubuntu/.claude/projects", machine = "Ubuntu") usage <- util_combine_usage(mac_usage, ubuntu_usage) my_dirs <- list(   macOS  = "~/.claude/projects",   Ubuntu = "/mnt/ubuntu/.claude/projects" )  usage <- do.call(util_combine_usage, mapply(   util_read_claude_code, my_dirs, names(my_dirs),   SIMPLIFY = FALSE ))

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: usage Anthropic Console Posit AI assistants (RStudio Positron), export CSV load util_read_usage_csv().

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: dashboard’s Data tab lets thing interactively without writing code — upload CSV directly merges dashboard.
code: console_usage <- util_read_usage_csv(   "~/Downloads/anthropic_usage_may2026.csv",   machine = "macOS" )  all_usage <- util_combine_usage(usage, console_usage)

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: util_add_cost() joins row’s model built-pricing table appends cost_usd column. Prices USD per million tokens. Cache-read tokens typically largest token category long Claude Code sessions (full project context re-read every turn), cost roughly 10× less standard input — cost impact often smaller raw counts suggest. Note: util_add_cost() uses estimates based Anthropic’s published list prices. Actual charges invoice may differ (e.g. due volume discounts enterprise agreements). Always treat figures approximate.
code: util_model_pricing() #> # A tibble: 9 × 5 #>   model             input_pm output_pm cache_write_pm cache_read_pm #>   <chr>                <dbl>     <dbl>          <dbl>         <dbl> #> 1 claude-opus-4        15        75             18.8           1.5  #> 2 claude-sonnet-4       3        15              3.75          0.3  #> 3 claude-opus-3-5      15        75             18.8           1.5  #> 4 claude-sonnet-3-7     3        15              3.75          0.3  #> 5 claude-sonnet-3-5     3        15              3.75          0.3  #> 6 claude-sonnet-3       3        15              3.75          0.3  #> 7 claude-haiku-3-5      0.8       4              1             0.08 #> 8 claude-haiku-3        0.25      1.25           0.3           0.03 #> 9 unknown               3        15              3.75          0.3 usage_with_cost <- util_add_cost(usage) dplyr::select(usage_with_cost, timestamp, model, input_tokens, output_tokens,               cache_read_tokens, cost_usd) # A tibble: 3,847 × 6    timestamp           model           input_tokens output_tokens cache_read_tokens cost_usd    <dttm>              <chr>                  <int>         <int>             <int>    <dbl>  1 2026-04-01 08:12:03 claude-opus-4           1284           342             42081   0.0814  2 2026-04-01 08:12:41 claude-opus-4            891           178             49204   0.0882  3 2026-04-01 09:45:10 claude-sonnet-4          302            84              8741   0.00365  # ℹ 3,844 more rows

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: util_summarise_usage() aggregates token counts cost grouping variable. default group "date":
code: daily <- util_summarise_usage(usage_with_cost) daily # A tibble: 49 × 7    date       input_tokens cache_creation_tokens cache_read_tokens output_tokens cost_usd n_requests    <date>            <int>                 <int>             <int>         <int>    <dbl>      <int>  1 2026-04-01        48291                182043           2481054        128470     52.4         87  2 2026-04-02        29183                 91032           1594821         73291     31.8         54  3 2026-04-03         8102                 22841            441093         21874      9.02        21  # ℹ 46 more rows

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: Pass column name (vector names) :
code: util_summarise_usage(usage_with_cost, by = "model") util_summarise_usage(usage_with_cost, by = "project") util_summarise_usage(usage_with_cost, by = c("date", "model"))

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: standard dplyr can compute cumulative spend time:

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: session one continuous Claude Code conversation (one JSONL file). Long exploratory sessions can consume far tokens focused ones. util_summarise_sessions() aggregates one row per session:
code: sessions <- util_summarise_sessions(usage_with_cost) sessions # A tibble: 214 × 15    session_id project         machine model           date       duration_min n_requests    <chr>      <chr>           <chr>   <chr>           <date>            <dbl>      <int>  1 9f3a1c…    projects/apps/R macOS   claude-opus-4   2026-05-12        187.          43  2 2d8e4b…    projects/books  macOS   claude-opus-4   2026-05-08         94.2         21  3 b71f30…    projects/pkgs/… macOS   claude-sonnet-4 2026-05-15         62.4         18  # ℹ 211 more rows  # ℹ 8 more variables: input_tokens <int>, output_tokens <int>,  #   cache_creation_tokens <int>, cache_read_tokens <int>,  #   total_tokens <int>, cost_usd <dbl>, outlier <lgl>

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: Sessions whose estimated cost exceeds mean + 2 standard deviations across sessions flagged outlier = TRUE. worth inspecting — often correspond long back--forth tricky problem, accidental re-processing large file. one session exists, sessions cost (standard deviation zero), outlier FALSE every row rather NA.
code: sessions |>   dplyr::filter(outlier) |>   dplyr::select(session_id, project, date, n_requests, cost_usd)

title: shokenuse User Guide
code: # Build a usage history: many cheap sonnet-4 sessions + one expensive opus-4 session. # We pre-set cost_usd directly to keep the example independent of pricing changes. make_session_row <- function(sid, model, cost) {   tibble::tibble(     timestamp             = as.POSIXct("2026-05-01", tz = "UTC"),     machine               = "macOS",     source                = "claude_code",     project               = "projects/demo",     session_id            = sid,     model                 = model,     input_tokens          = 500L,     cache_creation_tokens = 0L,     cache_read_tokens     = 1000L,     output_tokens         = 100L,     cost_usd              = cost   ) }  synthetic <- dplyr::bind_rows(   mapply(     \(i) make_session_row(paste0("cheap-", i), "claude-sonnet-4", 0.01),     seq_len(9), SIMPLIFY = FALSE   ),   list(make_session_row("expensive-1", "claude-opus-4", 8.50)) )  util_summarise_sessions(synthetic) |>   dplyr::select(session_id, models, n_requests, total_tokens, cost_usd, outlier) #> INFO [2026-05-21 22:11:14] Summarising 10 row(s) into sessions #> INFO [2026-05-21 22:11:14] Sessions: 10 total, 1 outlier(s) #> # A tibble: 10 × 6 #>    session_id  models          n_requests total_tokens cost_usd outlier #>    <chr>       <chr>                <int>        <int>    <dbl> <lgl>   #>  1 expensive-1 claude-opus-4            1         1600     8.5  TRUE    #>  2 cheap-1     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE   #>  3 cheap-2     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE   #>  4 cheap-3     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE   #>  5 cheap-4     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE   #>  6 cheap-5     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE   #>  7 cheap-6     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE   #>  8 cheap-7     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE   #>  9 cheap-8     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE   #> 10 cheap-9     claude-sonnet-4          1         1600     0.01 FALSE

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: launch_app() opens Shiny dashboard. app starts empty — load data Data tab using Admin API key uploading CSV.

title: shokenuse User Guide
text: Anthropic updates model pricing periodically. util_model_pricing() returns table util_add_cost() uses; can inspect time: prices change, update tibble::tribble() call R/util_data.R re-install package. "unknown" row acts fallback model name yet table, using sonnet-4 prices.
code: util_model_pricing() #> # A tibble: 9 × 5 #>   model             input_pm output_pm cache_write_pm cache_read_pm #>   <chr>                <dbl>     <dbl>          <dbl>         <dbl> #> 1 claude-opus-4        15        75             18.8           1.5  #> 2 claude-sonnet-4       3        15              3.75          0.3  #> 3 claude-opus-3-5      15        75             18.8           1.5  #> 4 claude-sonnet-3-7     3        15              3.75          0.3  #> 5 claude-sonnet-3-5     3        15              3.75          0.3  #> 6 claude-sonnet-3       3        15              3.75          0.3  #> 7 claude-haiku-3-5      0.8       4              1             0.08 #> 8 claude-haiku-3        0.25      1.25           0.3           0.03 #> 9 unknown               3        15              3.75          0.3

title: shokenuse User Guide
code: library(shokenuse)  # 1. Parse local Claude Code logs usage <- util_read_claude_code("~/.claude/projects", machine = "macOS")  # 2. Optionally add Console exports usage <- util_combine_usage(   usage,   util_read_usage_csv("~/Downloads/console_export.csv", machine = "macOS") )  # 3. Compute costs usage <- util_add_cost(usage)  # 4. Quick summaries in the console util_summarise_usage(usage, by = "model") util_summarise_usage(usage, by = c("date", "source"))  # 5. Find expensive sessions util_summarise_sessions(usage) |> dplyr::filter(outlier)  # 6. Explore interactively — load additional data from the Data tab launch_app()

what: Visualize LLM Token Usage Across Tools and Machines
title: Visualize LLM Token Usage Across Tools and Machines
text: Shiny dashboard tracking Anthropic API token usage estimated costs across models, projects, sessions.

title: Visualize LLM Token Usage Across Tools and Machines
code: # During local development devtools::load_all()  # Install from GitHub (once published) # pak::pak("mjfrigaard/shokenuse")

title: Visualize LLM Token Usage Across Tools and Machines
text: dashboard opens Data tab. Load data one two ways: 1. Admin API key — fetches last 30 days Anthropic organization account. Enter sk-ant-admin... key, give source Machine label (e.g. "org-name"), click Fetch Usage, Add Dashboard. Repeat different key load data another organization. 2. Upload CSV — paste usage export Anthropic Console another tool. Download R shell conversion script Data tab export local ~/.claude/projects/ session logs first.

title: Visualize LLM Token Usage Across Tools and Machines
text: util_* functions work independently dashboard scripted analysis:
code: # Read local Claude Code session logs usage <- util_read_claude_code("~/.claude/projects", machine = "macOS")  # Parse a CSV export csv   <- util_read_usage_csv("export.csv", machine = "macOS")  # Combine multiple sources all   <- util_combine_usage(usage, csv)  # Add cost estimates all   <- util_add_cost(all)  # Summarise by any column util_summarise_usage(all, by = "model") util_summarise_usage(all, by = c("date", "source"))  # Session-level breakdown with outlier flags util_summarise_sessions(all)

what: Fetch from the Admin API directly
title: Visualize LLM Token Usage Across Tools and Machines
text: See vignette("api-usage") full Admin API reference.
code: # Reads ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY from the environment usage <- util_fetch_usage(   starting_at  = "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",   ending_at    = "2025-01-31T23:59:59Z",   bucket_width = "1d",   group_by     = "model" )

what: Fetch cost data from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_cost
title: Fetch cost data from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_cost
text: Calls `GET /v1/organizations/cost_report` (daily granularity ). Requires Admin API key organization account.

title: Fetch cost data from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_cost
code: util_fetch_cost(   starting_at,   ending_at = Sys.time(),   group_by = character(),   api_key = Sys.getenv("ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY"),   max_pages = 10L )

title: Fetch cost data from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_cost
text: starting_at Start window (POSIXct ISO-8601 string). ending_at End window. Defaults current time. group_by Character vector grouping dimensions: `"workspace_id"`, `"description"`. api_key Admin API key. Defaults `ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY` env var. max_pages Maximum pagination pages fetch.

title: Fetch cost data from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_cost
text: Tibble cost data USD.

what: Fetch token usage from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_usage
title: Fetch token usage from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_usage
text: Calls `GET /v1/organizations/usage_report/messages`. Handles pagination automatically. Requires Admin API key organization account — available individual (personal) accounts.

title: Fetch token usage from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_usage
code: util_fetch_usage(   starting_at,   ending_at = Sys.time(),   bucket_width = c("1d", "1h", "1m"),   group_by = character(),   models = character(),   api_key = Sys.getenv("ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY"),   max_pages = 10L )

title: Fetch token usage from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_usage
text: starting_at Start window (POSIXct ISO-8601 string). ending_at End window. Defaults current time. bucket_width Aggregation interval: `"1d"`, `"1h"`, `"1m"`. group_by Character vector dimensions group . Valid values: `"model"`, `"workspace_id"`, `"api_key_id"`, `"service_tier"`. models Character vector model names filter; empty = . api_key Admin API key. Defaults `ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY` env var. max_pages Maximum pagination pages fetch (safety cap).

title: Fetch token usage from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_usage
text: Tibble `timestamp_bucket`, `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`,   `cache_creation_input_tokens`, `cache_read_input_tokens`,   grouping columns present response.

title: Fetch token usage from the Anthropic Admin API — util_fetch_usage
text: Response structure: top-level `data` array time buckets, `starting_at`, `ending_at`, nested `results` array records. Token counts use `uncached_input_tokens` nested `cache_creation` object rather flat `input_tokens` field.

what: Set the logging threshold for shokenuse — util_log_threshold
title: Set the logging threshold for shokenuse — util_log_threshold
text: Controls verbosity shokenuse log output. Use `"DEBUG"` see per-file per-request detail; `"INFO"` normal operation; `""` silence output.

title: Set the logging threshold for shokenuse — util_log_threshold
Set the logging threshold for shokenuse — util_log_threshold
text: level One `"TRACE"`, `"DEBUG"`, `"INFO"` (default), `"WARN"`, `"ERROR"`, `"FATAL"`, `""`.

title: Set the logging threshold for shokenuse — util_log_threshold
text: `NULL` invisibly.

what: Anthropic model pricing (USD per million tokens) — util_model_pricing
title: Anthropic model pricing (USD per million tokens) — util_model_pricing
text: Returns per-million-token prices input, output, cache creation, cache read known Claude models. Update Anthropic changes pricing.

title: Anthropic model pricing (USD per million tokens) — util_model_pricing
Anthropic model pricing (USD per million tokens) — util_model_pricing
text: Tibble columns `model`, `input_pm`, `output_pm`,   `cache_write_pm`, `cache_read_pm`.

what: Read token usage from Claude Code JSONL files — util_read_claude_code
title: Read token usage from Claude Code JSONL files — util_read_claude_code
text: Scans JSONL files `claude_dir` recursively extracts token usage assistant messages. row one API response.

title: Read token usage from Claude Code JSONL files — util_read_claude_code
Read token usage from Claude Code JSONL files — util_read_claude_code
text: claude_dir Path Claude projects directory. Defaults `~/.claude/projects`. machine Label stored `machine` column, e.g. `"macOS"`.

title: Read token usage from Claude Code JSONL files — util_read_claude_code
text: Tibble columns `timestamp`, `machine`, `source`, `project`,   `session_id`, `model`, `input_tokens`, `cache_creation_tokens`,   `cache_read_tokens`, `output_tokens`.

what: Read a manually exported usage CSV — util_read_usage_csv
title: Read a manually exported usage CSV — util_read_usage_csv
text: Required columns: `timestamp`, `source`, `model`, `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`. Optional: `machine`, `project`, `session_id`, `cache_creation_tokens`, `cache_read_tokens`.

title: Read a manually exported usage CSV — util_read_usage_csv
Read a manually exported usage CSV — util_read_usage_csv
text: path Path CSV file. machine Machine label used `machine` column present.

title: Read a manually exported usage CSV — util_read_usage_csv
text: Tibble matching schema [util_read_claude_code()].

what: Summarise token usage by session — util_summarise_sessions
title: Summarise token usage by session — util_summarise_sessions
text: Aggregates one row per session (`session_id`). Outliers sessions whose cost exceeds mean + 2 SD. SD zero undefined session flagged.

title: Summarise token usage by session — util_summarise_sessions
Summarise token usage by session — util_summarise_sessions
text: usage Tibble [util_read_claude_code()] [util_combine_usage()]. Cost computed automatically `cost_usd` absent.

title: Summarise token usage by session — util_summarise_sessions
text: One-row-per-session tibble `session_id`, `project`, `machine`,   `source`, `date`, `duration_min`, `models`, `n_requests`, token columns,   `total_tokens`, `cost_usd`, `outlier`. Ordered descending `cost_usd`.

what: Summarise usage by grouping variables — util_summarise_usage
title: Summarise usage by grouping variables — util_summarise_usage
text: Summarise usage grouping variables

title: Summarise usage by grouping variables — util_summarise_usage
Summarise usage by grouping variables — util_summarise_usage
text: usage Tibble [util_read_claude_code()] [util_combine_usage()]. Character vector grouping column names. Default `"date"`.

title: Summarise usage by grouping variables — util_summarise_usage
text: Summarised tibble token totals, cost, `n_requests`,   `total_tokens`.
